reconciliation.horizontal: The first final visual review found that nominal eye leaves exposed a detached teal eye layer in the closed-eye Relax pose. Eye controls were disabled, the complete head wrapper was rerendered, and three fresh independently randomized blind reviewers then passed the repaired horizontal pair without facial separation.
reconciliation.vertical: The same three fresh remediation reviewers passed the repaired vertical pair; the complete head control also has the required negative rendered screen-Y delta.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: disabled all eye translation and strengthened complete-head vertical translation and horizontal rotation before the final rerender
